name: joplin-curl
description: Persist Joplin clipper settings once for Data API tasks, or run one-shot Joplin Terminal commands for local note work without keeping Desktop Web Clipper open.

interface.shortDescription: Use Joplin via saved Data API config or one-shot Terminal commands
interface.longDescription: Use Joplin Curl when Codex should read, search, create, update, or move notes in a local Joplin client; list or search notebooks; search tags; make generic Joplin API requests for unsupported endpoints; run one-shot Joplin Terminal commands without keeping Desktop Web Clipper open; or scaffold and maintain a Joplin-backed LLM wiki. The plugin stores the clipper base URL, port, and token once for Data API mode, and can also invoke the Joplin Terminal executable for shell-mode note operations.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Joplin clipper connection and reuse it for future note tasks.
Find a Joplin note by title and update its body.
Create a Joplin-based LLM wiki scaffold and maintain its notes.
